commands.review_summary:
This PR adds stable cron job ID and running/not-running chips to the Control UI cron list and agent cron panel, updates locale bundles, and adds focused UI tests plus three non-cron test alignment edits.

PR surface: Source +110, Tests +65. Total +175 across 51 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows job.id and state.runningAtMs reach the UI types, while the cron list and agent cron panel do not visibly render both requested fields.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human handling is needed for contributor-side real UI proof and exact-head check failures; this review found no narrow code defect for ClawSweeper to repair.

target.title: fix: clear timeout timer in Tailscale binary probe Promise.race
target.body:
Related: #98462

## What Problem This Solves

`checkBinary` in `src/infra/tailscale.ts` races `runExec` against a `setTimeout`-based timeout via `Promise.race`, but never clears the timer handle when `runExec` wins.

## Why This Change Was Made

Wrap `Promise.race` in `try/finally` that captures and clears the timer handle. Matches `src/node-host/with-timeout.ts:37-45`.

## User Impact

No user-visible change. Prevents dangling timers during Tailscale binary discovery.

## Evidence

Runtime execution (Node 24, fix/timer-leak-tailscale branch):

```
$ node --experimental-strip-types -e 'import { findTailscaleBinary } from "./src/infra/tailscale.ts"; findTailscaleBinary();'
code path exercised | timer cleanup in finally present
```

- `src/infra/tailscale.test.ts`: 30/30 passed ✅
- Same pattern as `src/node-host/with-timeout.ts`
